Sibikshavathana M

AI & Data Science Student · Dancer · Photographer · Athlete

About Me

Hello! I'm Sibikshavathana M, a first-year Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (AI&DS) student at RD National College. I am an enthusiastic learner who enjoys exploring new technologies and constantly improving my skills.

Beyond academics, I express my creativity through dance and photography. I also enjoy sports, especially Kabaddi and Football, where I've learned teamwork, discipline, and leadership. As an extrovert, I enjoy meeting new people, sharing ideas, and taking on new challenges.

My goal is to combine creativity and technology to build innovative solutions that make a positive impact.

Career Goal

My ambition is to become a successful software developer and create modern, intelligent, and user-friendly applications. I aim to continuously learn, innovate, and contribute to the technology industry while inspiring others through creativity and dedication.

Motto
